question: Will Trailer 3 for Grand Theft Auto 6 be released by June 15, 2026?
reason: Rockstar Games plans to begin marketing GTA 6 in late June, making a June 15 trailer release unlikely.
evidence: Take-Two CEO Strauss Zelnick confirmed marketing will commence in summer 2026.
Marketing is expected to begin around or after June 21, the official start of summer.
No official announcement of a third trailer release before June 15.
searchQueries: Grand Theft Auto 6 trailer release date 2026
